name: local-slack-workspace
description: A local Slack mock (Web API + Socket Mode + Events API) with a web UI, for testing Slack apps/bots.

scripts.build:web: cd web && bun run build && cd ../server && bun scripts/copy-ui.ts
scripts.build:binary: bun run build:web && cd server && bun build --compile --minify src/cli.ts --outfile ../local-slack
scripts.build:binaries: bun run build:web && cd server && bun scripts/build-binaries.ts
